title: Smoky Thai Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish with a perfect balance of smoky and floral notes.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry.
In a small bowl, mix the smoked paprika, red curry paste, salt, and pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken breast.
Heat the coconut oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer it to the oven.
Bake the chicken for 15-20 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken is cooking, heat the remaining coconut oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Thai basil and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Serve the chicken with the Thai basil sauce spooned over the top.
